content:
# Recommendations â€” next plan iter (post iter-016)

## Closest-to-completion / prioritize (now UNBLOCKED)
- **G2/G3 cokernel leaves** â€” `cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar` (L1427), `cokernel_skyscraper_hom` (L1444) + `cokernel_skyscraper_hom_isIso` (L1461). The binding `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` they depend on is now closed axiom-clean, so these are the live frontier. Content: mult-by-`Ď€^{n+1}` automorphism on the stalk + residue field `= kĚ„`. These are the next prover lane â€” they close the S3 cokernel-iso chain end-to-end (top-level iso already sorry-free since iter-015).

## Dedicated lane (deep, do NOT assign as a quick prove)
- **`carrierSheaf_zero_iso_toModuleKSheaf`** (L1560) â€” Hartshorne II.6.3A bridge. NOT a quick close (~150â€“250 LOC). Mathlib gap PINNED: `IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.mem_integers_of_valuation_le_one`. Wiring needs (a) each affine chart ring is Dedekind (smoothâ‡’regular dim-1), (b) `HeightOneSpectrum.valuation` = `Scheme.RationalMap.order`, (c) per-chart sheaf gluing, (d) natural-iso assembly `carrierSheaf 0 â‰… toModuleKSheaf C`. Dispatch as its own `mathlib-build`/`prove` lane with effort-breaker decomposition first. Gates the 2 `sheafOf_ses_single_add` corners (L1701/1707).

## Blueprint fixes (planner / blueprint-writer domain)
- **B0 prose divergence (MAJOR, lean-vs-blueprint-checker).** `lem:finite_orderConstraintFail_affine`: Lean proof uses GLOBAL `Scheme.WeilDivisor.principal` finiteness, NOT the affine `finite_order_support_affine`. I added a `% NOTE:` flagging it. Writer: rewrite the proof prose to the principal-divisor route and DROP the two spurious `\uses{lem:finite_order_support_affine}` edges (statement L1700 + proof L1712). Statement + `\lean` pin are correct, leave them.
- **`carrierPresheaf_map_coe` coverage debt.** New Lean helper `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.WeilDivisor.sheafOf.carrierPresheaf_map_coe` (OcOfD.lean L1134) has no blueprint entry. Add a `\label`/`\lean`/`\uses` block between `def:sheafOf_carrierPresheaf` and `lem:carrierSheaf_stalk_iso_iSup` (which now `\uses` it). Statement: away from `âŠĄ`, `carrierPresheaf D`'s restriction map is `Submodule.inclusion` on underlying `K(C)`-values; `\uses{def:sheafOf_carrierPresheaf}`.
- **Minor (lvb).** `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq_fractionalIdeal` chapter promises the explicit `Ď€_P^{-n}đť’Ş_{C,P}` form while Lean delivers `â‰… orderAtPSubmodule` (fractional-ideal identification is prose-only); chapter states a nonzero-`g` hypothesis the Lean drops. Reconcile when convenient.

## Comment-only cleanup (next OcOfD prover â€” review cannot edit `.lean`)
- **OcOfD docstrings/header stale (CARRIED from iter-014/015, now WORSE).** lean-auditor iter-016: 6 majors, all stale comments â€” `sheafOf`/`sheafOf_zero`/`carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` docstrings + header still call now-closed decls "STUBBED"/"Tier-3 honest typed sorry". Header sorry-count claims also drift. Hand a single comment-only cleanup directive to the next OcOfD prover. No laundering, no excuse-comments â€” purely cosmetic but accumulating.
- Minor: `hW : IsAffineOpen W` is a dead (unused) parameter in `finite_orderConstraintFail_affine` (the principal-divisor route made it unnecessary). Harmless; could rename to `_hW` or drop if the signature is not blueprint-frozen.

## Do NOT retry without structural change
- The Hartshorne-6.3A bridge as a single blind `prove` â€” it is a genuine multi-step Mathlib-wiring development. Decompose (effort-breaker) before assigning.

## Note
- No informal-agent LLM key set (`DEEPSEEK/MOONSHOT/OPENROUTER/OPENAI/GEMINI` all empty) â€” second-opinion sketches unavailable for the bridge lane. Loop proceeds without it.
- S2 (Serre finiteness / ÄŚech-HÂą) remains the next phase after S3 closes; its shared HÂ˛/ExtÂ˛-vanishing gate node (RRFormula.lean:469 + `lem:grothendieck_vanishing_curve`) is still owed ONE shared project lemma before any S2 prover dispatch (carried).
